en.atmosphere: Quiet neighborhood. Note high seismic risk. Mixed vibe.
en.landmarks: No major landmarks. Small parks interspersed in residential blocks.
en.food: Limited dining (2 places). Rely on chains and fast food.
en.nightlife: Sparse nightlife. Neighborhood bars only. Early closing.

ja.atmosphere: 静かな地域。朝夕の時間帯に混雑。
ja.landmarks: 大きな見どころなし。小公園が点在。
ja.food: 食べ物少ない（2軒）。コンビニ頼り。

ru.landmarks: Нет крупных мест. Маленькие парки между домов.
